authority_reconciliation.repository_law: Fast Follow source evidence is candidate input only; this assessment grants no mutation, acceptance, release, deployment, promise, credential, or public-claim authority.

accepted_packet.effect: Admits target-native T3UI work in bounded packets. T3UI-04 includes collision-safe project/worktree creation and selection; receipts remain implementation evidence rather than parity or release authority.

packaged_evidence.effect: Records a complete 151-row census and bounded T3UI receipts without signed-release or total-parity claims.

full_auto_owner_real_evidence.effect: Development evidence for real Codex and Claude handoffs, restart, report, and analyzer; it explicitly does not supply independent assurance, packaging, signing, or public release authority.

open_relevant.role: independent Full Auto assurance; no active implementation claim observed
signed/package release gate; outside this mission lane
live update feed/tag; not authority for these lesson deltas

live_issue_observation.conclusion: Do not manufacture duplicate provider, projection, ACP, or DPoP work. Preserve the typed worktree-creation residual under the existing accepted T3UI-04 packet; mutation would still require current claim and packet reconciliation.

authority_reconciliation.assurance_exception: The pinned Full Auto AssuranceSpec remains proposed and predates the owner-real development receipt. Updating or admitting it belongs to independently owned issue #8978, not this evidence-only assessment.

bounded_candidate.desired_outcome: A typed main-process create-worktree intent requires an explicit base, refuses path collisions, binds canonical worktree/session/WorkContext refs privately, propagates exact cwd to Git, terminal, files, diff, and tools, serializes conflicting mutations, recovers after restart, and cleans up without deleting owner data.
required_proof: same-cwd conflicting mutations serialize or refuse
every work surface resolves the exact worktree root

aggregate.recommendation: Persist one evidence-only residual for typed, collision-safe worktree creation under the existing accepted T3UI-04 packet. Do not create duplicate provider, projection, ACP, or DPoP implementation work. A separate WorkProposal or explicit disposition artifact remains required before this mission bundle is complete.

classification.default_policy_exception: The target is a public repository and this artifact contains only committed public paths, public issue numbers, exact public Git identities, bounded findings, and digests; no prompts, transcripts, credentials, private source, absolute paths, or provider-private state are included.

retained_limits: This assessment compares exact Git objects and inspected tests; it does not substitute for target-local execution or owner acceptance.
Existing receipts are evidence at their stated pins and scopes, not a broad current parity or release verdict.

The standalone proposal/disposition, real two-provider mission run, visible handoff, restart boundary, report/analyzer receipt, terminal state, final receipt, and independent gates remain outside this one artifact.
The pinned T3 source checkout remained read-only and clean.
